# ChainAware Behavioral Prediction MCP

> An AI-native Web3 intelligence layer that gives AI agents predictive capabilities over blockchain wallets and smart contracts. Covers 14M+ wallets across 8 blockchains, built from 1.3B+ data points. Unlike forensic tools that describe the past, this MCP is predictive — it tells agents what is about to happen.

## Overview

- **MCP Endpoint:** https://prediction.mcp.chainaware.ai/sse
- **Auth:** `CHAINAWARE_API_KEY` header (request at https://chainaware.ai/pricing)
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/ChainAware/behavioral-prediction-mcp
- **Website:** https://chainaware.ai

## MCP Tools (5)

- `predictive_fraud` — Fraud probability (0–1) + AML forensic flags for a wallet. Networks: ETH, BNB, POLYGON, TON, BASE, TRON, HAQQ.
- `predictive_behaviour` — Wallet segmentation, intent, experience level, protocol history, personalized recommendations. Networks: ETH, BNB, BASE, HAQQ, SOLANA.
- `predictive_rug_pull` — Smart contract and liquidity pool rug pull risk scoring. Networks: ETH, BNB, BASE, HAQQ.
- `token_rank_list` — Ranked list of tokens by holder community strength, with search, filter, sort, and pagination. Networks: ETH, BNB, BASE, SOLANA.
- `token_rank_single` — Token community rank + top holders for a specific contract address. Networks: ETH, BNB, BASE, SOLANA.

## Claude Code Subagents (20)

Ready-to-use specialist subagents in `.claude/agents/`. Copy into any project after registering the MCP server.

- `chainaware-analyst` — Full due diligence combining fraud, behaviour, and rug pull analysis.
- `chainaware-fraud-detector` — Fast wallet fraud screening. Returns status, probability, and forensic flags.
- `chainaware-rug-pull-detector` — Smart contract and LP safety checks before depositing.
- `chainaware-wallet-marketer` — Generates a personalised marketing message (≤20 words) per wallet.
- `chainaware-reputation-scorer` — Reputation score 0–4000 using the ChainAware formula.
- `chainaware-aml-scorer` — AML compliance score 0–100 for KYC and regulatory workflows.
- `chainaware-trust-scorer` — Simple trust score 0.00–1.00 as `1 - fraud_probability`.
- `chainaware-wallet-ranker` — Wallet experience rank and global leaderboard position.
- `chainaware-token-ranker` — Discover and rank tokens by holder community strength.
- `chainaware-token-analyzer` — Single token deep-dive: community rank + top holders + global rank.
- `chainaware-onboarding-router` — Routes wallets to beginner / intermediate / skip onboarding flows.
- `chainaware-whale-detector` — Classifies wallets into Mega Whale / Whale / Emerging Whale / Not a Whale.
- `chainaware-defi-advisor` — Personalised DeFi product recommendations by experience + risk tier.
- `chainaware-airdrop-screener` — Batch screens wallets for airdrop eligibility; filters bots and fraud; ranks by reputation.
- `chainaware-lending-risk-assessor` — Borrower risk grade (A–F), recommended collateral ratio, and interest rate tier.
- `chainaware-token-launch-auditor` — Pre-listing launch safety audit: composite score, APPROVED / CONDITIONAL / REJECTED verdict.
- `chainaware-agent-screener` — Screens AI agent wallet + feeder wallet; returns Agent Trust Score 0–10.
- `chainaware-cohort-analyzer` — Segments a batch of wallets into behavioural cohorts with per-cohort engagement strategies.
- `chainaware-counterparty-screener` — Real-time pre-transaction go/no-go verdict (Safe / Caution / Block).
- `chainaware-governance-screener` — DAO voter screening: Sybil detection, governance tier, and voting weight multiplier.

## Key Scoring Formulas

- **Reputation Score:** `1000 × (experience + 1) × (willingness_to_take_risk + 1) × (1 - fraud_probability)`
- **AML Score:** `(1 - probabilityFraud) × 100` — returns 0 if any forensic flag is present
- **Trust Score:** `1 - probabilityFraud` → 0.00–1.00

## Setup (Claude Code)

```bash
claude mcp add --transport sse chainaware-behavioral-prediction \
  https://prediction.mcp.chainaware.ai/sse \
  --header "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY"
```

```bash
git clone https://github.com/ChainAware/behavioral-prediction-mcp.git
cp -r behavioral-prediction-mcp/.claude/agents/ your-project/.claude/agents/
export CHAINAWARE_API_KEY="your-key-here"
```

## Key Files

- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md) — Machine-readable index of all 20 subagents with triggers, tools, inputs, and outputs
- [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) — Full skill definition for Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenClaw ClawHub
- [CLAUDE.md](./CLAUDE.md) — Project conventions, subagent table, scoring formulas, and blog references
- [README.md](./README.md) — Full documentation, tool schemas, and integration guides
- [references/tools-fraud.md](./references/tools-fraud.md) — `predictive_fraud` full schema and forensic flags
- [references/tools-behaviour.md](./references/tools-behaviour.md) — `predictive_behaviour` full schema and intent signals
- [references/tools-rug-pull.md](./references/tools-rug-pull.md) — `predictive_rug_pull` full schema
- [references/tools-token-rank-list.md](./references/tools-token-rank-list.md) — `token_rank_list` full schema
- [references/tools-token-rank-single.md](./references/tools-token-rank-single.md) — `token_rank_single` full schema
